events.name: US CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Core consumer inflation measure indicating price pressures excluding volatile items.

events.name: US Producer Price Index (PPI) (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures wholesale inflation and early pricing pressures in the economy.

events.name: US Producer Price Index (M-o-M)
events.description: Monthly change in producer prices affecting cost conditions.

events.name: US Retail Sales
events.description: Monthly measure of consumer spending, a key GDP driver.

events.name: UK Trade Balance
events.description: Difference between exports and imports, indicating external demand.

events.name: Eurozone Industrial Production (M-o-M)
events.description: Monthly change in euro area industrial output.

events.name: Eurozone CPI (YoY)
events.description: Headline consumer inflation measure for the euro area.

events.name: Eurozone Exports/Imports/Trade Balance
events.description: Detailed euro area external sector statistics.
